findings.location: s2 — 作成内容 table, W11AC0202.jsp row
findings.description: In the source RST table, W11AC0201.jsp and W11AC0202.jsp are listed together in a single row spanning two lines, meaning both share the 'View' stereotype. The knowledge file splits them into two separate rows but assigns the 'View' stereotype only to W11AC0201.jsp, leaving W11AC0202.jsp with an empty stereotype column. The View stereotype for W11AC0202.jsp is lost.
findings.source_evidence: RST table row: W11AC0201.jsp and W11AC0202.jsp are both listed in the first cell of a single data row, with 'View' in the stereotype cell shared by both entries.
